name: Aisha Rahman
bio: Met during freshman orientation. She's now a UX designer in Dhaka who loves street photography.

name: James Okafor
bio: My first team lead at the agency. Taught me everything I know about clean code and deadlines.

name: Sofia Mendes
bio: Grew up on the same street. Now lives in Lisbon but we talk every week over coffee calls.

name: Tariq Hassan
bio: We shared a tiny dorm room for two years. He's a civil engineer now and rarely comes online.

name: Priya Nair
bio: Colleague turned best friend. We bonded over late-night product launches and terrible vending machine coffee.

name: Luca Bianchi
bio: Met backpacking through Southeast Asia. We still trade travel tips and meet up whenever our paths cross.

name: Nadia Karim
bio: Our parents were close, so we practically grew up together. Life pulled us in different directions but the bond stays.

name: Daniel Park
bio: Gym partner and occasional hiking buddy. Keeps me accountable on fitness goals better than any app.

name: Fatima Al-Zahra
bio: We survived finals week together every semester. Now she's doing her PhD in molecular biology in Berlin.

name: Marcus Thompson
bio: A senior dev who reviewed my first pull request and didn't laugh. Still gives great career advice over coffee.
